allow: Bash(node -e "const c=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('.phonetics-cache.json','utf-8'\)\); console.log\('缓存单词数:', Object.keys\(c\).length\); const empty=Object.entries\(c\).filter\(\([k,v]\)=>!v.uk&&!v.us\).length; console.log\('空结果:', empty\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const r=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('reports/phonetics-trans-check-report.json','utf-8'\)\);console.log\('=== 剩余音标问题清单 ==='\);for\(const d of r.dictionaries\){if\(d.phoneIssueCount===0&&d.transIssueCount===0\)continue;console.log\('\\n'+d.name+' \('+d.file+'\):'\);for\(const p of d.phoneIssues\){const i=p.issues.map\(x=>x.desc\).join\('; '\);console.log\('  ['+p.word+'] uk=\\"'+p.uk+'\\" us=\\"'+p.us+'\\" -> '+i\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./.youdao-phonetics-cache.json'\); const entries = Object.entries\(c\).filter\(\([w,d]\) => d.ukphone || d.usphone\); console.log\('有音标缓存:', entries.length\); console.log\('无音标缓存:', Object.keys\(c\).length - entries.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./reports/validation-report.json'\); console.log\('跨词库重复单词数量:', r.crossDictDuplicates.length\); console.log\('重复最多的前20个:'\); r.crossDictDuplicates.slice\(0,20\).forEach\(d=>console.log\(d.name, '-', d.fileCount, '个词库:', d.files.join\(', '\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=fs.readdirSync\('src/dictionaries'\).filter\(f=>f.endsWith\('.json'\)\); files.forEach\(f=>{const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/'+f,'utf8'\)\); console.log\(f+':', d.totalWords||0, 'words,', d.totalChapters||0, 'chapters'\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/junior.json','utf8'\)\); const z=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/zhongkao.json','utf8'\)\); const jw=new Set\(j.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name\)\)\); const zw=new Set\(z.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name\)\)\); const inter=[...jw].filter\(w=>zw.has\(w\)\); console.log\('junior总词数:', jw.size\); console.log\('zhongkao总词数:', zw.size\); console.log\('交集:', inter.length\); console.log\('重复率:', \(inter.length/jw.size*100\).toFixed\(1\)+'%'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const s=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/senior.json','utf8'\)\); const g=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/gaokao.json','utf8'\)\); const sw=new Set\(s.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name\)\)\); const gw=new Set\(g.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name\)\)\); const inter=[...sw].filter\(w=>gw.has\(w\)\); console.log\('senior总词数:', sw.size\); console.log\('gaokao总词数:', gw.size\); console.log\('交集:', inter.length\); console.log\('重复率:', \(inter.length/sw.size*100\).toFixed\(1\)+'%'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c4=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/cet4.json','utf8'\)\); const c4f=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/cet4freq.json','utf8'\)\); const c4w=new Set\(c4.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name\)\)\); const c4fw=new Set\(c4f.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name\)\)\); const inter=[...c4fw].filter\(w=>c4w.has\(w\)\); console.log\('cet4总词数:', c4w.size\); console.log\('cet4freq总词数:', c4fw.size\); console.log\('交集:', inter.length\); console.log\('cet4freq在cet4中的占比:', \(inter.length/c4fw.size*100\).toFixed\(1\)+'%'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c6=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/cet6.json','utf8'\)\); const c6f=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/cet6freq.json','utf8'\)\); const c6w=new Set\(c6.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name\)\)\); const c6fw=new Set\(c6f.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name\)\)\); const inter=[...c6fw].filter\(w=>c6w.has\(w\)\); console.log\('cet6总词数:', c6w.size\); console.log\('cet6freq总词数:', c6fw.size\); console.log\('交集:', inter.length\); console.log\('cet6freq在cet6中的占比:', \(inter.length/c6fw.size*100\).toFixed\(1\)+'%'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=['junior','zhongkao','senior','gaokao','cet4','cet4freq','cet6','cet6freq']; files.forEach\(f=>{const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/'+f+'.json','utf8'\)\); const actual=d.chapters.reduce\(\(s,c\)=>s+\(c.words?.length||0\),0\); console.log\(f+': JSON.totalWords='+d.totalWords+', 实际='+actual\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=fs.readdirSync\('src/dictionaries'\).filter\(f=>f.endsWith\('.json'\)\); files.forEach\(f=>{const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/'+f,'utf8'\)\); const actual=d.chapters.reduce\(\(s,c\)=>s+\(c.words?.length||0\),0\); console.log\(f+': JSON.totalWords='+\(d.totalWords||'N/A'\)+', 实际='+actual+', 章节='+d.chapters.length\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c4=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/warri/typing-word/src/dictionaries/cet4.json'\)\); const c6=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/warri/typing-word/src/dictionaries/cet6.json'\)\); const c4words=new Set\(c4.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name.toLowerCase\(\)\)\)\); const c6words=new Set\(c6.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words.map\(w=>w.name.toLowerCase\(\)\)\)\); console.log\('cet4 words:', c4words.size\); console.log\('cet6 words:', c6words.size\); let c6only=0; for\(const w of c6words\) if\(!c4words.has\(w\)\) c6only++; console.log\('cet6-only words:', c6only\); console.log\('cet6 in cet4:', c6words.size-c6only\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c4=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/warri/typing-word/src/dictionaries/cet4.json'\)\); const c6=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/warri/typing-word/src/dictionaries/cet6.json'\)\); const c4w=c4.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words\); const c6w=c6.chapters.flatMap\(c=>c.words\); const c4map=new Map\(c4w.map\(w=>[w.name.toLowerCase\(\),w]\)\); const c6map=new Map\(c6w.map\(w=>[w.name.toLowerCase\(\),w]\)\); let sameTrans=0, diffTrans=0; for\(const [name,w6] of c6map\){const w4=c4map.get\(name\); if\(w4\){const t4=JSON.stringify\(w4.trans\); const t6=JSON.stringify\(w6.trans\); if\(t4===t6\) sameTrans++; else diffTrans++;}} console.log\('Same trans:', sameTrans\); console.log\('Diff trans:', diffTrans\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=['tem4','ielts','toefl','postgraduate']; files.forEach\(f=>{const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./src/dictionaries/'+f+'.json','utf8'\)\); let emptyTrans=0, noName=0, dupes=new Set\(\), dupeCount=0; data.chapters.forEach\(ch=>{ch.words?.forEach\(w=>{if\(!w.name\)noName++; if\(!w.trans||\(Array.isArray\(w.trans\)&&w.trans.length===0\)||\(Array.isArray\(w.trans\)&&w.trans.every\(t=>!t||t.trim\(\)===''\)\)\)emptyTrans++; if\(dupes.has\(w.name\)\)dupeCount++; else dupes.add\(w.name\);}\);}\); console.log\(f+': emptyTrans='+emptyTrans,'noName='+noName,'dupes='+dupeCount\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const meta=require\('./src/dictionaries/meta.js'\); meta.dictionaryMeta.forEach\(d=>{try{const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./src/dictionaries/'+d.id+'.json','utf8'\)\); const actualWords=data.chapters?data.chapters.reduce\(\(s,c\)=>s+\(c.words?.length||0\),0\):\(Array.isArray\(data\)?data.length:0\); const match=d.totalWords===actualWords?'OK':'MISMATCH meta='+d.totalWords+' actual='+actualWords; console.log\(d.id+':',match\); }catch\(e\){console.log\(d.id+': ERROR'\);} }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=['tem4','ielts','toefl','postgraduate']; files.forEach\(f=>{const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./src/dictionaries/'+f+'.json','utf8'\)\); const ids=data.chapters.map\(c=>c.id\); const types=[...new Set\(ids.map\(id=>typeof id\)\)]; console.log\(f+': idTypes='+types.join\(','\), 'firstId='+ids[0], 'lastId='+ids[ids.length-1]\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=['tem4','ielts','toefl','postgraduate']; files.forEach\(f=>{const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./src/dictionaries/'+f+'.json','utf8'\)\); const ch=data.chapters[0]; const w=ch.words[0]; console.log\(f,'sample:',JSON.stringify\(w\).slice\(0,120\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=['tem4','ielts','toefl','postgraduate']; files.forEach\(f=>{const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./src/dictionaries/'+f+'.json','utf8'\)\); let total=0, spaces=0, short=0; data.chapters.forEach\(ch=>{ch.words?.forEach\(w=>{total++; if\(w.name.includes\(' '\)\)spaces++; if\(w.name.length<=2\)short++;}\);}\); console.log\(f+': total='+total,'spaces='+spaces,'short\(<=2\)='+short\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/dictionaries/tem4.json','utf-8'\)\); const last=d.chapters[d.chapters.length-1]; console.log\('chapters:', d.chapters.length, 'last chapter:', last.id, last.name, 'words:', last.words.length\); console.log\('first 3 words:', last.words.slice\(0,3\).map\(w=>w.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/dictionaries/toefl.json', {assert: {type: 'json'}}\).then\(m => { const data = m.default; let total = 0; let dups = {}; data.chapters.forEach\(c => { c.words.forEach\(\(w, i\) => { const k = w.name.toLowerCase\(\); total++; if \(k in dups\) dups[k].push\({ch: c.id, idx: i, name: w.name}\); else dups[k] = [{ch: c.id, idx: i, name: w.name}]; }\); }\); const dupNames = Object.entries\(dups\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v.length > 1\); console.log\('Total words:', total\); console.log\('Duplicates:', dupNames.length\); dupNames.forEach\(\([k,v]\) => { console.log\(k + ': ' + JSON.stringify\(v\)\); }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/dictionaries/toefl.json', {with: {type: 'json'}}\).then\(m => { const data = m.default; let total = 0; let dups = {}; data.chapters.forEach\(c => { c.words.forEach\(\(w, i\) => { const k = w.name.toLowerCase\(\); total++; if \(k in dups\) dups[k].push\({ch: c.id, idx: i, name: w.name}\); else dups[k] = [{ch: c.id, idx: i, name: w.name}]; }\); }\); const dupNames = Object.entries\(dups\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v.length > 1\); console.log\('Total words:', total\); console.log\('Duplicates:', dupNames.length\); dupNames.forEach\(\([k,v]\) => { console.log\(k + ': ' + JSON.stringify\(v\)\); }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const files=fs.readdirSync\('c:/Users/warri/typing-word/src/dictionaries'\).filter\(f=>f.endsWith\('.json'\)\); let totalWords=0; files.forEach\(f=>{const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('c:/Users/warri/typing-word/src/dictionaries/'+f\)\); const words=d.totalWords||d.chapters.reduce\(\(a,c\)=>a+c.words.length,0\); totalWords+=words; console.log\(f+':', words, 'words'\);}\); console.log\('\\\\nTOTAL:', files.length, 'dictionaries,', totalWords, 'total words'\);")
